examples: "Why don't you borrow your sister's car?" said Cassandra stiffly.
"She thinks we have lost the way," he replied stiffly, "and she is rather frightened."
Mary knew nothing about boys and she spoke to him a little stiffly because she felt rather shy.
As bored-looking Bunnies stood stiffly against pounding hip-hop music, James was having trouble finding the happiness.
So smokers should be assessed stiffly, even though they tend to be of lower income than nonsmokers.
